top_signals.title: Mortgage rates surge to highest level since July
top_signals.summary: Mortgage rates continued to move higher Tuesday on uncertainty over the war with Iran. They are at the highest level since last July.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
